import requests, json
r = requests.get\(''https://shinto.miraheze.org/w/api.php'', params={
    ''action'': ''query'',
    ''titles'': ''List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province'',
    ''prop'': ''revisions'',
    ''rvprop'': ''content'',
    ''rvslots'': ''main'',
    ''format'': ''json''
}, headers={''User-Agent'': ''ShintoWikiBot/1.0''}\)
pages = r.json\(\)[''query''][''pages'']
p = next\(iter\(pages.values\(\)\)\)
content = p.get\(''revisions'', [{}]\)[0].get\(''slots'', {}\).get\(''main'', {}\).get\(''*'', ''''\)
print\(content[:2000]\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\Immanuelle\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe" -c "
import mwclient
import io, sys
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding=''utf-8''\)

site = mwclient.Site\(''shinto.miraheze.org''\)
site.login\(''Immanuelle'', ''[REDACTED_SECRET_2]''\)

# Get first few pages from the category
cat = site.categories[''Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages'']
count = 0
for page in cat:
    if count >= 5:
        break
    text = page.text\(\)
    if ''jalink'' in text.lower\(\):
        print\(f''=== {page.name} ===''\)
        # Print lines with jalink
        for i, line in enumerate\(text.split\(''\\n''\)\):
            if ''jalink'' in line.lower\(\):
                print\(f''  Line {i}: {line[:300]}''\)
        print\(\)
        count += 1
    else:
        print\(f''--- {page.name}: no jalink found''\)
")

Bash(cd /c/Users/Immanuelle/Documents/Github/wikibot && C:/Users/Immanuelle/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe -c "
import mwclient, re, io, sys
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

site = mwclient.Site\('shinto.miraheze.org', path='/w/',
    clients_useragent='ShintoWikiBot/1.0'\)
site.login\('Immanuelle', '[REDACTED_SECRET_2]'\)

TMPL_FROM = re.compile\(r'\\{\\{\\s*moved from\\s*\\|\([^}|]+?\)[\\s}]', re.IGNORECASE\)
TMPL_TO   = re.compile\(r'\\{\\{\\s*moved to\\s*\\|\([^}|]+?\)[\\s}]',   re.IGNORECASE\)

starting = set\(p.name for p in site.categories['Move starting points']\)
targets  = set\(p.name for p in site.categories['Move targets']\)

# Sample 5 pages from each
print\('=== 5 pages from Move starting points ==='\)
for title in sorted\(starting\)[:5]:
    text = site.pages[title].text\(\) or ''
    tos = [m.group\(1\).strip\(\) for m in TMPL_TO.finditer\(text\)]
    froms = [m.group\(1\).strip\(\) for m in TMPL_FROM.finditer\(text\)]
    print\(f'  {title!r}'\)
    print\(f'    moved to  : {tos}'\)
    print\(f'    moved from: {froms}'\)
    if tos:
        b = tos[0]
        print\(f'    b in targets? {b in targets!r} \(b={b!r}\)'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 5 pages from Move targets ==='\)
for title in sorted\(targets\)[:5]:
    text = site.pages[title].text\(\) or ''
    tos = [m.group\(1\).strip\(\) for m in TMPL_TO.finditer\(text\)]
    froms = [m.group\(1\).strip\(\) for m in TMPL_FROM.finditer\(text\)]
    print\(f'  {title!r}'\)
    print\(f'    moved from: {froms}'\)
    print\(f'    moved to  : {tos}'\)
    if froms:
        a = froms[0]
        print\(f'    a in starting? {a in starting!r} \(a={a!r}\)'\)
" 2>&1)
